title: InReal Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function InReal (PortNumber As Integer) As Single
parameters:
PortNumber	Integer expression representing the
		 I/O Input port.
description: Returns the input data of 2 words (32 bits) as the floating-point data (IEEE754 compliant) of 32 bits.
see_also:
In, InBCD, InW, Out, OutW, OutReal

InReal Example

VB
examples:
Dim val As Single
val = m_spel.InReal(32)
